glosses.vi: ám ảnh; thói quen ám ảnh

sentences.target: J'ai la manie de tout vérifier.

translations.fr: J'ai la manie de tout vérifier.
translations.en: I have the habit of checking everything.
translations.es: Tengo la manía de revisar todo.
translations.de: Ich habe die Angewohnheit, alles zu überprüfen.
translations.it: Ho la mania di controllare tutto.
translations.ko: 나는 모든 걸 확인하는 버릇이 있어.
translations.yue: 我有檢查晒所有嘢嘅習慣。
translations.ru: У меня есть привычка всё проверять.
translations.pt: Eu tenho o hábito de verificar tudo.
translations.tr: Her şeyi kontrol etme alışkanlığım var.
translations.vi: Tôi có thói quen kiểm tra mọi thứ.
translations.nl: Ik heb de gewoonte om alles te controleren.
translations.hi: मुझे हर चीज़ जांचने की आदत है.
translations.el: Έχω τη συνήθεια να ελέγχω τα πάντα.
translations.nb: Jeg har for vane å sjekke alt.
translations.sv: Jag har för vana att kontrollera allt.
translations.da: Jeg har for vane at kontrollere alt.
translations.ja: 私は何でも確認する癖があります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before vowel-initial verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of lexical 'avoir'; main verb selecting the NP 'la manie de…' as its complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'manie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP object of 'ai'; takes a 'de' + infinitive complement.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('de' + infinitif) specifying the content of the 'manie'.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object of the infinitive 'vérifier'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'manie' introduced by 'de'; governs the object 'tout'.

sentences.target: Il a la manie de ranger.

translations.fr: Il a la manie de ranger.
translations.en: He has the habit of tidying up.
translations.es: Él tiene la manía de ordenar.
translations.it: Ha la mania di mettere in ordine.
translations.pt: Ele tem o hábito de arrumar.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thói quen dọn dẹp.
translations.nl: Hij heeft de gewoonte om op te ruimen.
translations.hi: उसे चीज़ें समेटने की आदत है.
translations.nb: Han har for vane å rydde.
translations.sv: Han har för vana att städa.
translations.ro: Are obiceiul de a face ordine.
translations.da: Han har for vane at rydde op.
translations.ja: 彼は片づける癖がある。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of lexical 'avoir'; main predicate taking 'la manie de…' as its complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'manie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP complement of 'a'; followed by 'de' + infinitive.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement licensed by 'manie de'.

sentences.target: Tu as cette manie avec ton téléphone.
sentences.reading: /ty a sɛt ma.ni a.vɛk tɔ̃ te.le.fɔn/

translations.fr: Tu as cette manie avec ton téléphone.
translations.ipa: /ty a sɛt ma.ni a.vɛk tɔ̃ te.le.fɔn/
translations.en: You have that habit with your phone.
translations.es: Tienes esa manía con tu teléfono.
translations.de: Du hast diese Angewohnheit mit deinem Handy.
translations.it: Hai quella mania con il tuo telefono.
translations.ko: 너는 휴대폰과 관련해 그런 버릇이 있어.
translations.yue: 你對部手機有嗰種習慣。
translations.ru: У тебя с телефоном такая привычка.
translations.pt: Você tem aquela mania com o seu telefone.
translations.he: יש לך את ההרגל הזה עם הטלפון שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn có thói quen đó với điện thoại của mình.
translations.nl: Je hebt die gewoonte met je telefoon.
translations.uk: У тебе є ця звичка з телефоном.
translations.hu: Megvan az a szokásod a telefonoddal kapcsolatban.
translations.hi: तुम्हें फोन को लेकर वह आदत है.
translations.pl: Masz ten nawyk związany z telefonem.
translations.el: Έχεις εκείνη τη συνήθεια με το τηλέφωνό σου.
translations.nb: Du har den vanen med telefonen din.
translations.id: Kamu punya kebiasaan itu dengan ponselmu.
translations.sv: Du har den där vanan med din telefon.
translations.ro: Ai obiceiul acela cu telefonul tău.
translations.cs: Máš ten zvyk se svým telefonem.
translations.da: Du har den der vane med din telefon.
translations.fi: Sinulla on se tapa puhelimesi kanssa.
translations.ja: あなたはスマホでそういう癖がある。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of lexical 'avoir'; main verb.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'manie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'as'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular agreeing with 'téléphone'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Sa manie de couper la parole fatigue tout le monde.
sentences.reading: /sa ma.ni də ku.pe la pa.ʁɔl fa.tiɡ tul mɔ̃d/

translations.fr: Sa manie de couper la parole fatigue tout le monde.
translations.ipa: /sa ma.ni də ku.pe la pa.ʁɔl fa.tiɡ tul mɔ̃d/
translations.en: Her habit of interrupting tires everyone out.
translations.es: Su manía de interrumpir cansa a todo el mundo.
translations.de: Ihre Angewohnheit, andere zu unterbrechen, ermüdet alle.
translations.it: La sua mania di interrompere stanca tutti.
translations.ko: 그녀의 말 끊는 버릇은 모두를 지치게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她打断别人说话的习惯让所有人都很疲惫。
translations.yue: 佢打斷人講嘢嘅習慣令所有人都好攰。
translations.pt: O hábito dela de interromper cansa todo mundo.
translations.he: ההרגל שלה לקטוע אנשים בדיבור מעייף את כולם.
translations.tr: Onun söz kesme alışkanlığı herkesi yoruyor.
translations.vi: Thói quen cắt lời của cô ấy làm mọi người mệt mỏi.
translations.ar: عادتها في مقاطعة الكلام ترهق الجميع.
translations.nl: Haar gewoonte om anderen te onderbreken put iedereen uit.
translations.hu: Az a szokása, hogy félbeszakít, mindenkit kifáraszt.
translations.hi: उसकी बीच में बात काटने की आदत सबको थका देती है.
translations.el: Η συνήθειά της να διακόπτει κουράζει τους πάντες.
translations.nb: Hennes vane med å avbryte gjør alle slitne.
translations.id: Kebiasaannya memotong pembicaraan membuat semua orang lelah.
translations.sv: Hennes vana att avbryta gör alla trötta.
translations.ro: Obiceiul ei de a întrerupe îi obosește pe toți.
translations.da: Hendes vane med at afbryde trætter alle.
translations.ja: 彼女の話を遮る癖はみんなを疲れさせる。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular possessive determiner; agrees in gender/number with 'manie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement specifying the content of the 'manie'.
Infinitive verb within the 'de' + infinitive complement.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'couper'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Predeterminer modifying 'le monde' in the fixed expression 'tout le monde' ('everyone'); part of the direct object NP.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'tout le monde', functioning as the direct object of 'fatigue'.
